description: A stylish, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design this pair looks great with day and party wear.  The high-shine metal-look striped strap will perfectly complement ethnic or Western evening dresses.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.Heel: 1"UpperTextured footbed, lightly padded for absolute comfort and styleThong style strap with soft felt inner lining and patent leather-look cords arranged in stripes on upperHas a toe separator to comfortably hold the foot in placeOutsoleDurable outsole with gold coloured heelHorizontal grooves on the heel for ultimate grip Sandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
